title: barthea barthei var. formosana
intro: Barthea barthei var. formosana, also known as Formosan barthea, is a variety of the Barthea barthei plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Barthea barthei var. formosana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
